$comment: Reviewed intentional divergences from the JS-generated goldens. Each entry downgrades a mismatch to an informational 'allowed divergence' for a specific engine. Use '*' wildcards for profile/id. Example: { "engine": "writr-rust", "profile": "default", "id": "commonmark/0042", "reason": "KaTeX markup differs; tracked in #123", "approvedBy": "jaredwray", "date": "2026-06-14" }
